display_information.name: Compass
display_information.description: AI Agent Governance Layer — intercepts, scores, and controls every MCP tool call made by AI agents in your Slack workspace.
display_information.long_description: Compass is an enterprise governance proxy that sits between your Slack AI agents and Slack's MCP endpoint. Every tool call — from chat.postMessage to admin.users.invite — is evaluated against OWASP AIVSS risk scores, a ring-based trust model (Ring 0–3), and your organization's YAML policy before it executes. Sensitive operations require human approval via Block Kit buttons. Suspicious agents are circuit-broken automatically. All events are written to an immutable audit log. Built on Microsoft Agent Governance Toolkit.

slash_commands.usage_hint: [status | agents | approvals | trust | circuit | suspend <agent-id> | policy reload]
